note: One key disputatio question per section. Authored in the companion parent's guide, then mirrored here. Leave 'questions' empty to ship the app before the guide is finished — the Discuss screen degrades gracefully and still rewards logged conversations. Unlock a question with ONE of: unlockAtPage (page-books), unlockAtUnit (completion-books, the unit id), or unlockAtPct.

questions.question: Bilbo wants nothing to do with the adventure. Make the strongest case that staying home would have been the wiser, more responsible choice — then say what, if anything, is missing from that case.
questions.note: Listen for whether comfort is being mistaken for virtue. First-principles move: what is a life FOR? Delete this example row and replace with real questions from the guide.
